subject: npmx Weekly #18
headline: npmx Weekly #18
intro: Exciting updates have arrived for npmx! This week’s highlights include a major version release and important community developments.

topics.title: Version Release v0.13.0
topics.summary: Merged PR #2713 introduces version v0.13.0 of npmx.dev, featuring enhancements like nodejs noodle, UI improvements, and various bug fixes, elevating overall performance.

topics.title: Repository Metadata Fixes
topics.summary: Merged PR #2769 resolves a bug in fetching repository metadata by adjusting object spreading, ensuring the default User-Agent header is preserved while allowing custom headers.

topics.title: URL Redirection for Versions View
topics.summary: A new feature redirects users from the npmjs versions tab to the npmx versions view, streamlining user experience across both platforms.
